subject: Jeffrey Epstein
body: Hi Nili...Jeffrey says he is free to meet with Ehud anytime from Friday Sept. 21st onwards...so what ever is most convenient for Ehud!...does not need to be Monday 24th.. please do let me know what suits his schedule best and we will do it.
